# US050-Apply-for-role

## User Story
As an applicant, I want to be able to apply for a job role. So I can register my interest in Kainos

## Acceptance criteria:
- If the number of open positions is more than 0 and the status of the role is "open" a button should appear on the job information page for applicant users to apply.
- A new page should allow the applicant to upload CV
- When submitted, application status should be set to "in progress"

## Non-functional requirements:
- CV should be stored in AWS S3 bucket (ask mentor to create bucket)
